attribution.Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 for ver 1.16.1 b:
-INFO-

For the values to stick you need to do the following:

    Start the game.
    Enable the cheats on the main menu.
    Select your save.
    Once you've loaded into Conton City wait for it to finish save upon loading (look for the saving symbol on the bottom right, it will happen as soon as the screen stops being white).
    Press the home button (you can go disable the cheats now if you want) and quit the game by pressing X on the closed game (if exit to the main menu or do anything that will save your game after it initially loads Conton City and saves then it will overwrite with your values before you entered the cheats).
    Load into the game again normally and your cheats should have taken affect on your save.

Thanks to fadx

attribution.DRAGON BALL Xenoverse 2 for Nintendo Swi:
By Hazerou

[FPS Toggle] Button Combos;

Press R Stick + Left Dpad = 30 FPS
Press R Stick + Right Dpad = 60 FPS


FPS Cheats only works in Battles because 60 FPS is not a good experience during exploration mode (Handheld Mode + Max OC).

Also when using 60 FPS, Game Speed will slow down when FPS drops.


--------------

Older versions:

[FPS Toggle] Button Combos;
R STICK + LEFT = [30 FPS For Use When Exploring]
R STICK + RIGHT = [30 FPS For Use In Battle]
R STICK + UP = [60 FPS]
